mapper.select:
/* SQL ID : ReshAnsrDAO.listReshJoinDeviceStatus 설 명 : 설문 참여 장치별 현황 조회 */
WITH CRS_CRE AS ( SELECT SBJCT_ID FROM TB_LMS_RESCH_CRE_CRS_RLTN WHERE SRVY_ID = #{reschCd} ) SELECT A.CD AS deviceTypeCd, A.CDNM AS deviceTypeNm, COUNT(B.STD_ID) AS reshFinCnt FROM TB_ORG_CODE A LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_SRVY_PTCP B ON A.CD = B.CNTN_DVC_TYCD AND B.SRVY_ID = #{reschCd} AND B.USER_ID IS NOT NULL AND B.USER_ID != '' LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_USER_ACNT C ON B.USER_ID = C.USER_ID AND C.ACNT_STSCD = 'U'
LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT D ON B.STD_ID = D.STD_ID AND C.USER_ID = D.USER_ID AND D.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S'
LEFT JOIN CRS_CRE E ON D.SBJCT_ID = E.SBJCT_ID WHERE A.CTGRCD = 'CNTN_DVC_TYCD' AND A.ORG_ID = #{orgId} AND A.USEYN = 'Y' GROUP BY A.CD, A.CDNM, A.CD_SEQ ORDER BY A.CD_SEQ

/* SQL ID : ReshAnsrDAO.listReshQstnItemAnswerStatus 설 명 : 설문 문항별 선택지 응답현황 */ SELECT A.SRVY_VWITM_ID , A.RESCH_QSTN_ITEM_TITLE , A.VWITM_SEQ , A.ETC_INPT_USEYN , A.JOIN_CNT , A.TOT_JOIN_CNT
, REPLACE(TO_CHAR(CASE WHEN A.RNUM = 1 THEN 100 - ACUM_RATIO ELSE A.RATIO END), '.0', '') AS RATIO FROM ( SELECT A.SRVY_VWITM_ID , A.RESCH_QSTN_ITEM_TITLE , A.VWITM_SEQ , A.ETC_INPT_USEYN , A.JOIN_CNT , A.TOT_JOIN_CNT , ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY A.JOIN_CNT DESC, A.VWITM_SEQ DESC) RNUM , ROUND(A.JOIN_CNT / CASE WHEN A.TOT_JOIN_CNT = 0 THEN 1 ELSE A.TOT_JOIN_CNT END * 100, 1) AS RATIO , SUM(ROUND(A.JOIN_CNT / CASE WHEN A.TOT_JOIN_CNT = 0 THEN 1 ELSE A.TOT_JOIN_CNT END * 100, 1)) OVER(ORDER BY A.JOIN_CNT) - ROUND(A.JOIN_CNT / CASE WHEN A.TOT_JOIN_CNT = 0 THEN 1 ELSE A.TOT_JOIN_CNT END * 100, 1) AS ACUM_RATIO FROM ( SELECT D.SRVY_VWITM_ID , D.RESCH_QSTN_ITEM_TITLE , D.VWITM_SEQ , D.ETC_INPT_USEYN , COUNT(E.SRVY_RSPNS_ID) OVER(PARTITION BY D.SRVY_QSTN_ID, D.SRVY_VWITM_ID) JOIN_CNT , COUNT(E.SRVY_RSPNS_ID) OVER(PARTITION BY D.SRVY_QSTN_ID) TOT_JOIN_CNT FROM SRVY_VWITM D LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_SRVY_RSPNS E ON D.SRVY_QSTN_ID = E.SRVY_QSTN_ID AND D.SRVY_VWITM_ID = E.SRVY_VWITM_ID AND E.USER_ID != ''
AND E.USER_ID IN (SELECT USER_ID FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT WHERE SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND AUDITYN = 'N')
WHERE D.SRVY_QSTN_ID = #{reschQstnCd} ) A GROUP BY A.SRVY_VWITM_ID , A.RESCH_QSTN_ITEM_TITLE , A.VWITM_SEQ , A.ETC_INPT_USEYN , A.JOIN_CNT , A.TOT_JOIN_CNT ) A ORDER BY A.VWITM_SEQ

/* SQL ID : ReshAnsrDAO.listReshJoinUser 설 명 : 설문 참여자 리스트 조회 */ SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY C.USERNM) AS lineNo , A.SRVY_ID AS reschCd , B.USER_ID AS userId , B.STD_ID AS stdNo , B.GDSC_DGRS_CRS_GBNCD , (SELECT CDNM FROM TB_ORG_CODE WHERE ORG_ID = B.ORG_ID AND CTGRCD = 'GDSC_DGRS_CRS_GBNCD' AND CD = B.GDSC_DGRS_CRS_GBNCD) AS GRSC_DEGR_CORS_GBN_NM , E.CNTN_DVC_TYCD AS deviceTypeCd , (SELECT MAX(AA.CDNM) FROM TB_ORG_CODE AA WHERE AA.CTGRCD = 'CNTN_DVC_TYCD' AND AA.CD = E.CNTN_DVC_TYCD) AS deviceTypeNm , C.DEPT_CD AS deptCd , C.DEPTNM AS deptNm , C.USERNM AS userNm , D.USER_ID AS userId , C.USER_GRADE AS grade , (SELECT MAX(FRST_INQ_DTTM) FROM TB_LMS_SRVY_RSPNS WHERE SRVY_ID = A.SRVY_ID AND USER_ID = B.USER_ID GROUP BY USER_ID) AS regDttm , C.MOBILE_NO AS mobileNo , C.EMAIL AS email , NVL(E.SCR, 0) AS SCR , NVL((SELECT 'Y' FROM TB_LMS_SRVY_RSPNS WHERE SRVY_ID = A.SRVY_ID AND USER_ID = B.USER_ID GROUP BY USER_ID), 'N') AS joinYn , COUNT(1) OVER() AS totalCnt , NVL(B.SCYR,'-') SCYR , NVL(C.ENTR_YY,'-') ENTR_YY , NVL(C.ENTR_HY,'-') ENTR_HY , NVL(C.ENTR_GBN,'-') ENTR_GBN , NVL(C.ENTR_GBN_NM,'-') ENTR_GBN_NM FROM TB_LMS_RESCH_CRE_CRS_RLTN A JOIN TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT B ON A.SBJCT_ID = B.SBJCT_ID AND B.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' JOIN TB_LMS_USR C ON B.USER_ID = C.USER_ID JOIN TB_LMS_USER_ACNT D ON C.USER_ID = D.USER_ID AND B.USER_ID = D.USER_ID AND D.ACNT_STSCD = 'U' LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_SRVY_PTCP E ON B.USER_ID = E.USER_ID AND A.SRVY_ID = E.SRVY_ID WHERE A.SRVY_ID = #{reschCd} AND B.AUDITYN = 'N'
AND ( LOWER(C.DEPT_CD) LIKE FN_LIKE_VAL(LOWER(#{searchValue})) OR LOWER(C.DEPTNM) LIKE FN_LIKE_VAL(LOWER(#{searchValue})) OR LOWER(B.USER_ID) LIKE FN_LIKE_VAL(LOWER(#{searchValue})) OR LOWER(C.USERNM) LIKE FN_LIKE_VAL(LOWER(#{searchValue})) )
AND B.USER_ID IN (SELECT USER_ID FROM TB_LMS_SRVY_RSPNS WHERE SRVY_ID = A.SRVY_ID AND USER_ID = B.USER_ID GROUP BY USER_ID)
AND B.USER_ID NOT IN (SELECT USER_ID FROM TB_LMS_SRVY_RSPNS WHERE SRVY_ID = A.SRVY_ID AND USER_ID = B.USER_ID GROUP BY USER_ID)
AND E.EVLYN = 'Y'
AND (E.EVLYN != 'Y' OR E.EVLYN IS NULL)
ORDER BY C.USERNM
LIMIT #{firstIndex}, #{listScale}

/* SQL ID : ReshAnsrDAO.reshJoinUserCnt 설 명 : 설문 참여자 수 조회 */ SELECT * FROM ( SELECT NVL(COUNT(A.SRVY_ID), 0) FROM TB_LMS_RESCH_CRE_CRS_RLTN A JOIN TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT B ON A.SBJCT_ID = B.SBJCT_ID JOIN TB_LMS_USR C ON B.USER_ID = C.USER_ID JOIN TB_LMS_USER_ACNT D ON C.USER_ID = D.USER_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_SRVY_PTCP E ON B.USER_ID = E.USER_ID AND A.SRVY_ID = E.SRVY_ID WHERE A.SRVY_ID = #{reschCd} AND B.AUDITYN = 'N'
AND ( LOWER(C.DEPT_CD) LIKE FN_LIKE_VAL(LOWER(#{searchValue})) OR LOWER(C.DEPTNM) LIKE FN_LIKE_VAL(LOWER(#{searchValue})) OR LOWER(B.USER_ID) LIKE FN_LIKE_VAL(LOWER(#{searchValue})) OR LOWER(C.USERNM) LIKE FN_LIKE_VAL(LOWER(#{searchValue})) )
AND B.USER_ID IN (SELECT USER_ID FROM TB_LMS_SRVY_RSPNS WHERE SRVY_ID = A.SRVY_ID AND USER_ID = B.USER_ID GROUP BY USER_ID)
AND B.USER_ID NOT IN (SELECT USER_ID FROM TB_LMS_SRVY_RSPNS WHERE SRVY_ID = A.SRVY_ID AND USER_ID = B.USER_ID GROUP BY USER_ID)
AND E.EVLYN = 'Y'
AND (E.EVLYN != 'Y' OR E.EVLYN IS NULL)
GROUP BY A.SRVY_ID UNION SELECT 0 FROM DUAL ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1
mapper.insert:
/* SQL ID : ReshAnsrDAO.insertReshJoinUser 설 명 : 설문 참여자 등록 */
MERGE INTO TB_LMS_SRVY_PTCP T USING ( SELECT #{reschCd} AS SRVY_ID, #{userId} AS USER_ID, #{stdNo} AS STD_ID, #{deviceTypeCd} AS CNTN_DVC_TYCD, #{connIp} AS CNTN_IP, NVL(#{SCR}, 0) AS SCR, NVL(#{evalYn}, 'N') AS EVLYN, #{rgtrId} AS RGTR_ID, #{mdfrId} AS MDFR_ID FROM DUAL ) S ON ( T.SRVY_ID = S.SRVY_ID AND T.USER_ID = S.USER_ID ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET T.MDFR_ID = S.MDFR_ID, T.MOD_DTTM = FN_DTTM()
, T.STD_ID = S.STD_ID
, T.CNTN_DVC_TYCD = S.CNTN_DVC_TYCD
, T.CNTN_IP = S.CNTN_IP
, T.SCR = S.SCR
, T.EVLYN = S.EVLYN
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( SRVY_ID, USER_ID, STD_ID, CNTN_DVC_TYCD, CNTN_IP, SCR, EVLYN, RGTR_ID, FRST_INQ_DTTM, MDFR_ID, MOD_DTTM ) VALUES ( S.SRVY_ID, S.USER_ID, S.STD_ID, S.CNTN_DVC_TYCD, S.CNTN_IP, S.SCR, S.EVLYN, S.RGTR_ID, FN_DTTM(), S.MDFR_ID, FN_DTTM() )
mapper.select:
/* SQL ID : ReshAnsrDAO.reshQstnJoinUserCnt 설 명 : 설문 문항 참여자 수 조회 */ SELECT NVL(COUNT(A.SRVY_RSPNS_ID), 0) FROM TB_LMS_SRVY_RSPNS A WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.SRVY_QSTN_ID IN
#{item}

/* SQL ID : ReshAnsrDAO.selectHomeReshJoinUserStatus 설 명 : 홈페이지 설문 참여 현황 조회 */ SELECT ( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_USER_AUTHRT AA JOIN TB_LMS_USER_ACNT BB ON AA.USER_ID = BB.USER_ID AND BB.ACNT_STSCD = 'U' WHERE A.JOIN_TRGT REGEXP AA.USER_AUTHRT_ID AND AA.MENU_TYCD = 'HOME' ) AS reshApplicantCnt , ( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_SRVY_PTCP AA WHERE AA.SRVY_ID = A.SRVY_ID ) AS reshFinCnt FROM TB_LMS_SRVY A WHERE A.SRVY_ID = #{reschCd}

/* SQL ID : ReshAnsrDAO.listReshQstnAndScale 설 명 : 설문 문항 및 척도 목록 */ SELECT A.SRVY_ID , A.RESCH_PAGE_CD , A.RESCH_PAGE_ODR , B.SRVY_QSTN_ID , B.RESCH_QSTN_TITLE , B.RESCH_QSTN_ODR , B.RESCH_QSTN_TYPE_CD , C.SRVY_VWITM_ID , C.RESCH_QSTN_ITEM_TITLE , C.VWITM_SEQ FROM TB_LMS_RESCH_PAGE A JOIN TB_LMS_SRVY_QSTN B ON A.RESCH_PAGE_CD = B.RESCH_PAGE_CD LEFT JOIN SRVY_VWITM C ON C.SRVY_QSTN_ID = B.SRVY_QSTN_ID AND B.RESCH_QSTN_TYPE_CD = 'SCALE' WHERE A.SRVY_ID = #{reschCd} ORDER BY A.RESCH_PAGE_ODR, B.RESCH_QSTN_ODR, C.VWITM_SEQ

/* SQL ID : ReshAnsrDAO.selectReshJoinUserInfo 설 명 : 설문 참여자 정보 조회 */ SELECT A.SRVY_ID AS reschCd , A.USER_ID AS userId , A.STD_ID AS stdNo , A.CNTN_DVC_TYCD AS deviceTypeCd , NVL((SELECT CDNM FROM TB_ORG_CODE WHERE ORG_ID = B.ORG_ID AND CTGRCD = 'CNTN_DVC_TYCD' AND CD = A.CNTN_DVC_TYCD), '') AS deviceTypeNm , B.DEPT_CD AS deptCd , B.DEPTNM AS deptNm , B.USERNM AS userNm , C.USER_ID AS userId , A.SCR AS SCR , A.SCR_MEMO AS profMemo FROM TB_LMS_SRVY_PTCP A JOIN TB_LMS_USR B ON A.USER_ID = B.USER_ID JOIN TB_LMS_USER_ACNT C ON B.USER_ID = C.USER_ID WHERE A.SRVY_ID = #{reschCd} AND A.USER_ID = #{rgtrId}
AND A.STD_ID = #{stdNo}

/* SQL ID : ReshAnsrDAO.listReshMyAnswer 설 명 : 나의 설문 답변 목록 */ SELECT A.SRVY_ID AS reschCd , A.USER_ID AS userId , D.RESCH_PAGE_CD AS reschPageCd , B.SRVY_QSTN_ID AS reschQstnCd , CASE WHEN E.ETC_INPT_USEYN = 'Y' THEN 'ETC' ELSE B.SRVY_VWITM_ID END AS reschQstnItemCd , NVL(B.ETC_OPNN, E.RESCH_QSTN_ITEM_TITLE) AS reschQstnItemTitle , F.SRVY_SCALE_CD AS reschScaleCd , F.EVL_TTL AS scaleTitle , B.SRVY_RSPNS_ID AS reschAnsrCd FROM TB_LMS_SRVY R JOIN TB_LMS_SRVY_PTCP A ON R.SRVY_ID = A.SRVY_ID JOIN TB_LMS_SRVY_RSPNS B ON A.SRVY_ID = B.SRVY_ID AND A.USER_ID = B.USER_ID JOIN TB_LMS_SRVY_QSTN C ON B.SRVY_QSTN_ID = C.SRVY_QSTN_ID JOIN TB_LMS_RESCH_PAGE D ON C.RESCH_PAGE_CD = D.RESCH_PAGE_CD LEFT JOIN SRVY_VWITM E ON B.SRVY_QSTN_ID = E.SRVY_QSTN_ID AND B.SRVY_VWITM_ID = E.SRVY_VWITM_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_RESCH_SCALE F ON F.SRVY_QSTN_ID = B.SRVY_QSTN_ID AND F.SRVY_SCALE_CD = B.SRVY_SCALE_CD WHERE R.SRVY_ID = #{reschCd} AND A.USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY A.USER_ID, D.RESCH_PAGE_ODR, C.RESCH_QSTN_ODR
mapper.update:
/* SQL ID : ReshAnsrDAO.updateReshScore 설 명 : 설문 점수 수정 */
MERGE INTO TB_LMS_SRVY_PTCP T USING ( SELECT #{reschCd} AS SRVY_ID, #{userId} AS USER_ID, #{stdNo} AS STD_ID,
(SELECT CASE WHEN #{SCR} < 0 THEN 0 WHEN #{SCR} > 100 THEN 100 ELSE #{SCR} END FROM DUAL)
#{SCR}
AS SCR, 'Y' AS EVLYN, #{rgtrId} AS RGTR_ID, #{mdfrId} AS MDFR_ID FROM DUAL ) S ON ( T.SRVY_ID = S.SRVY_ID AND T.USER_ID = S.USER_ID ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET T.EVLYN = 'Y', T.MDFR_ID = S.MDFR_ID, T.MOD_DTTM = FN_DTTM(), T.SCR =
(SELECT CASE WHEN NVL(T.SCR, 0) + #{SCR} < 0 THEN 0 WHEN NVL(T.SCR, 0) + #{SCR} > 100 THEN 100 ELSE NVL(T.SCR, 0) + #{SCR} END FROM DUAL)
S.SCR
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( SRVY_ID, USER_ID, STD_ID, SCR, EVLYN, RGTR_ID, FRST_INQ_DTTM, MDFR_ID, MOD_DTTM ) VALUES ( S.SRVY_ID, S.USER_ID, S.STD_ID, S.SCR, S.EVLYN, S.RGTR_ID, FN_DTTM(), S.MDFR_ID, FN_DTTM() )
mapper.select: /* SQL ID : ReshAnsrDAO.selectProfMemo 설 명 : 설문 메모 조회 */ SELECT #{reschCd} AS reschCd , A.USER_ID AS userId , C.STD_ID AS stdNo , D.CNTN_DVC_TYCD AS deviceTypeCd , IFNULL((SELECT CDNM FROM TB_ORG_CODE WHERE ORG_ID = A.ORG_ID AND CTGRCD = 'CNTN_DVC_TYCD' AND CD = D.CNTN_DVC_TYCD), '') AS deviceTypeNm , A.DEPT_CD AS deptCd , A.DEPTNM AS deptNm , A.USERNM AS userNm , B.USER_ID AS userId , D.SCR AS SCR , D.SCR_MEMO AS profMemo FROM TB_LMS_USR AS A JOIN TB_LMS_USER_ACNT AS B ON A.USER_ID = B.USER_ID AND B.ACNT_STSCD = 'U' JOIN TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT AS C ON A.USER_ID = C.USER_ID AND C.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND C.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_SRVY_PTCP AS D ON A.USER_ID = D.USER_ID AND D.SRVY_ID = #{reschCd} WHERE A.USER_ID = #{userId}
